data.title: Lab page: Search bar, tagging system, and archive navigation

data.body:
Add search and tagging infrastructure to the Lab page's research archive (FRAC-47 dependency). 

Components:
- Search bar at top of archive section (filter documents by title/author/content)
- Tag system — each document badge gets tags (e.g. 'philosophy', 'AI', 'governance', 'culture')
- Tag filter UI — clickable tag chips to filter the archive
- Eventually a navigable, browsable archive experience

This builds on top of the document badges from FRAC-47. Start with client-side search/filter since the dataset is small.
Implementation complete. All 9 files created/modified per plan. Typecheck passes, production build succeeds. Branch frac-48-lab-search-tags pushed to origin. Ready for review.
REVIEW PASS. Hook logic correct (query AND tags, tags OR). Mobile-first. ARIA attributes present. Empty state handled. Typecheck clean.
